description.ko: ECHO-0 환경 내에서 음향 에너지를 시각적으로 구현한 것으로, 음파가 생동감 넘치는 기하학적 빛의 패턴과 유체 운동으로 변환되는 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual manifestation of acoustic energy within the ECHO-0 environment, where sound waves are transformed into vibrant geometric light patterns and fluid motion.

prompt: Cinematic visualization of complex sound waves and sonic frequencies, glowing neon pulse patterns, iridescent ripples in a dark liquid digital space, mathematical geometry, ECHO-0 interface style, high-tech abstract aesthetic, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed particles.
